notes: Implemented Stage 8 on branch codex/stage8-asset-integration. Replaced placeholder runtime visuals with stylized floor treatment (warm room/hallway palettes, entry glow overlays, safe-room highlight, weak-point crack/barricade overlays, and decorative furniture silhouettes) in FloorRenderer. Expanded RuntimeSpriteFactory with circle/soft-circle/triangle/paper sprites for compositional art across world and UI. Upgraded alien silhouettes per type: Grey large-head profile, ghostly shimmer Stalker reveal behavior, TechUnit with pulsing hack device, and larger red Overlord silhouette accents. Upgraded defense visuals and palette styling in DefensePlacementController: paint can trap, shotgun mount, dog, and roomba iconography with warm card-like buttons. Added combat/event polish in DefenseInstance and AlienBase: trap flash + burst, weapon trace flash, dog/shotgun/roomba audio hooks, and alien 0.3s shrink death with green poof. Replaced AudioManager with persistent service providing wired placeholder music/SFX hooks (trap, death, shotgun, roomba loop, dog bark, UI click, wave start, power surge) and edit-mode-safe lifecycle handling. Added hazard surge audio trigger, safe-room breach HUD flash + shake feedback, parchment-tinted HUD styling, draft card paper styling with accent bars, and UI click wiring across menu/meta/HUD flows. Verification via Unity MCP: compilation errors 0; EditMode tests passed 29/29; PlayMode tests passed 18/18; play-mode smoke run produced zero console errors.
